title: Ronin's Aesthetic PvP Pack
description: This is my custom pvp pack that I have made with lots of optimizations, plus a bunch of mods that make Minecraft look crisp :D
body:
![a minecraft title in minecraft's signature font displaying "RONIN'S PVP MODPACK"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7a2d834bbd5e5802408bb25b50e61919a5fcdfa_0.webp)
This is my custom PvP pack that I have made with lots of optimizations, plus a bunch of mods that make Minecraft look crisp. Some of the mods added are not the BEST possible for PVP and combat, but they are a good mix of pure PVP optimizations and graphical additions! Many of these mods hurt performance but make the game look better. You can enable and disable any mods that you don't want if you prefer a more FPS-oriented pack.

![Title Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3d027e668cbcdadc5b81dbc8938de5338027284.png)

- Features inclue:
- 3D Skin Layers
- Complementary Shaders
- Fresh Animations
- Inventory Interactions
- Flashback
- Custom Title Screen
- And Many Performance Mods!
